method: BugsInPy top-3 bottleneck proxy over the with-vs-without-Graphify study.
scope_note: Regenerated after retargeting to BugsInPy. The local run used canned/offline responses, so it is recorded as inconclusive rather than presented as proof of quality improvement.

metrics.rationale: The regenerated rows preserve source_file evidence, but the answers are canned offline responses, so traceability cannot be credited beyond artifact linkage.
Measured context was 45 tokens in both arms, so the regenerated BugsInPy proxy does not demonstrate token reduction.
Both arms received 0/5 quality from the local judge path; this is inconclusive rather than evidence of correct identification.
The assisted path used the Graphify comparison entry point, but the canned/offline responses prevent a meaningful before/after score.
